name: base-only
description: Framework-only proof (base split, Swift 2.4): base 3.0.0 alone - ZERO content areas, ZERO pages, ZERO catalog, no theme leg (nothing to skin). Smoke is API/DB-level: /Admin/ liveness + token auth + the framework row-count contract (shops/payments/shippings/order-states/languages/currencies + 0/0/96 catalog-free counts + Page=0/Area=0). Proven on DW 10.28.1-PreRelease.
